calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Dec-08-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Judge Pro Tem James H. Fleming, Clerk-Beth Wilber, nothing on record:
9:55am
Cause called for Small Claims appeal. 6 related cases are heard together: 028190, 028192, 028195, *028197, 028200, 028201. (All Small Claims Appeal Exhibits will be marked and identified with case #028190, and retained in that file until returned to parties.)

Anna Levitan, official Russian Interpreter appears with Mr. Lipson, to serve as translator for the appellants in all 6 related cases; Mr. Alec Berger serves as an informal interpreter of Russian for the Respondents in all 6 related cases. Mr. Berger's wife, Nelly Merzhevitsky is also present.

*No. 028197:
Respondent, Yulia Yermakova, appears in Pro; Appellant(s) Michael Nazlukhanyan, appears through counsel Kenneth A. Lipson.

Respondents, previously sworn, present their respective cases in the narrative with the help of Mr. Berger. Mr. Lipson presents Appellant's case, with the help of Ms. Levitan, with direct examination and cross-examination of parties. Judge Fleming also questions the parties.
1:00pm
Matters are submitted

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Aug-03-2006 Continued To Dec-06-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 525
